home.headline: Create more. Work smarter. Live better.
home.subtitle: Join the ranks of AI-driven creators shaping the future. Learn how to leverage creativity and technology to build meaningful work in the age of artificial intelligence.
home.movementSubtitle: Future-proof yourself with these tools and insights
home.aboutSubtitle: Just a human exploring the intersection of technology and creativity.
home.bioParagraph1: I'm a creator, developer, and writer obsessed with the mind, technology, and the art of building meaningful digital experiences.
home.bioParagraph2: Previously, I worked as a software engineer and product designer, helping teams build products that people love. Now I write about creativity, productivity, and the future of work in the AI era.
home.bioParagraph3: For those wondering, I am not accepting consulting clients or "quick chats to pick my brain" at the moment. If you'd like to learn from me, explore my articles and courses above.
